title: Pyrex 500 ml Kitchen Lab Measure and Mix Beaker, Multicolour
features: Measuring cup made of lightweight borosilicate glass: resistant to thermal shocks: from -40┬░ to 300┬░
Lowering of the vehicle's centre of gravity
description: Product Description Pyrex, a committed French brand! At Pyrex, we are committed to a free and uninhibited style of cooking, free from codes of perfection. For over 100 years, our Pyrex cookware and storage containers have been inspired by a love of French cuisine. Our commitment is to develop and produce healthy and durable glass products in our French factory, suitable for a wide range of uses! Previous page A dish that adapts to every situation! Simplify the preparation of your dishes with Pyrex bowls, bowls, jugs and measuring cups! Mixing and preserving Mix all your dishes, sweet or savoury! You can store your dishes in the bowl Dishwasher safe Hygienic material that won't accumulate stains or odours Easy to wash Cook and reheat Oven and microwave safe without lid Extreme heat resistance (up to 300┬░C) Easy to use Lid with tab & Writing space on lid Stackable bowls to save space Red writing Large handle for the jug Next page 1 Pyrex jugs & bowls 2 Mixing and preserving 3 Easy to wash 4 Cook and reheat 5 Easy to use Discover our prepware accesories !
